name: Training-Free, Identity-Preserving Image Editing for Fashion Pose Alignment and Normalization

description: arXiv:2501.13692v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion models have recently unlocked new possibilities in editing images of real-world objects. Yet, transforming objects in non-rigid ways, such as modifying poses or applying image-based conditioning, continues to present significant challenges. Retaining the unique identity of objects during these edits is a complex task, and curre...
author: Potito Aghilar, Vito Walter Anelli, Michelantonio Trizio, Eugenio Di Sciascio, Tommaso Di Noia
